patterns.name: GitHub Fine-Grained Personal Access Token
patterns.risk: Access to GitHub repositories, issues, PRs, and actions depending on token scope.
patterns.fix: Use GITHUB_TOKEN env var. For CI, use the automatic GITHUB_TOKEN or deploy keys.

patterns.name: GitHub Classic Personal Access Token
patterns.risk: Broad access to GitHub resources depending on selected scopes.
patterns.fix: Migrate to fine-grained PAT with minimal scope. Store in environment variable.

patterns.name: GitHub OAuth Access Token
patterns.risk: Access to GitHub on behalf of a user.
patterns.fix: Store in secure session storage, never in source code.

patterns.name: GitHub App Installation Token
patterns.risk: Grants permissions of the GitHub App installation.
patterns.fix: These are short-lived and should be generated at runtime via the App's private key.

patterns.name: GitHub App Refresh Token
patterns.risk: Can generate new access tokens for a user.
patterns.fix: Store in encrypted session storage, never in source code.

patterns.name: GitLab Personal Access Token
patterns.risk: Access to GitLab repositories and API depending on scope.
patterns.fix: Use CI/CD variables or environment variables.

patterns.name: GitLab Pipeline Trigger Token
patterns.risk: Can trigger CI/CD pipelines in a project.

patterns.name: Bitbucket App Password
patterns.description: Bitbucket app password or API token
patterns.risk: Access to Bitbucket repositories and API.
patterns.fix: Use environment variables or Bitbucket Pipelines secure variables.
